operator_profiles.label: Contested field operator
operator_profiles.use_case: Launch/monitor drone ops from whatever edge device is available
operator_profiles.proof_expectation: Threat-fast spectral path + swarm route on edge hardware

operator_profiles.label: Cluster edge team
operator_profiles.use_case: Multi-box gossip + swarm without datacenter or cloud
operator_profiles.proof_expectation: Multi-host OTA soak + cluster ms/agent on edge cluster

operator_profiles.label: Interior DC operator
operator_profiles.use_case: Corpus ingest, reference libraries, evidence vault for the org
operator_profiles.proof_expectation: Shard catalog + byte counts + sovereign ingest lanes

operator_profiles.label: Builder lab (LLC)
operator_profiles.use_case: Ship production stack; researchers use REPL on same substrate
operator_profiles.proof_expectation: Measured harness on lab edge class — same code path as field

operator_profiles.label: GSA / gov drone contractor
operator_profiles.use_case: Spectral intelligence on government drone / EW programs
operator_profiles.proof_expectation: Scenario sim + proof substrate + reproducible deliverables for customer

deployment_classes.edge_contested: Field edge — issued laptop, phone, or tablet in contested environments
deployment_classes.cluster_edge: Cluster edge — 2–10 sovereign boxes on LAN/OTA, no cloud dependency
deployment_classes.interior_datacenter: Interior data center — sovereign corpus vault inside your org (not public cloud)
deployment_classes.builder_lab: Builder lab — LLC sovereign R&D floor (AI-assisted engineering is still a real lab)
deployment_classes.industry_contractor: Industry contractor — GSA/gov drone & spectral work on customer programs
deployment_classes.benchmark_reference_only: Cloud/datacenter — comparison baseline in benchmarks only, not a deploy target

evidence_language.say_instead_of_independent_lab: sovereign builder lab (LLC) or customer program repro — not a false dichotomy
evidence_language.measured_local_means: Measured on edge-class hardware via reproducible harness in your environment
evidence_language.gap_means: Not yet demonstrated on named physical asset — gap is specific, not 'fake'

third_way_statement: Users are already in the industries that require this — GSA contractors, defense integrators, enterprise spectral teams. They deploy from edge hardware on program sites. MESIE is production substrate for builders and their customers, not a science-fair REPL and not a cloud SaaS upsell.
